name: ajaia-docs
description: Lightweight collaborative document editor — Ajaia AI-Native Full Stack assignment

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.start: npm run migrate:deploy -w server && npm run start -w server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w server && npm run typecheck -w client
